TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: uzai a mareḍava katua mareqali ka sitsuayan a masiasik.
S.PHON: uzai a marəɖava katua marəqaɭi ka siʦuajan a masiasik.
S.FORM: uzai a maredrava katua mareqali ka sicuayan a masiasik.
S.PHON: uzai a maRəɖava katua maRəqaɣi ka siʦuajan a masiasik.
S.TRANSL: Once upon a time there were some girls and men weeding.

S.FORM: masasuvalivalit tiamadju a masik.
S.PHON: masasuvaɭivaɭit tiamaɉu a masik.
S.FORM: masasuvalivalit tiamadju a masik.
S.PHON: masasuvaɣivaɣit tiamaɉu a masik.
S.TRANSL: They took it in turns to weed.

S.FORM: kiɫavaran a mareqali: "timunay anan a mareḍava a masik," ayain.
S.PHON: kiʎavaran a marəqaɭi: "timunaj anan a marəɖava a masik," ajain.
S.FORM: kiljavaran a mareqali: "timunay anan a maredrava a masik," ayain.
S.PHON: kiʎavaRan a maRəqaɣi: "timunaj anan a maRəɖava a masik," ajain.
S.TRANSL: The men said: “You girls weed first.”

S.FORM: "ui," aya azua mareḍava.
S.PHON: "ui," aja azua marəɖava.
S.FORM: "ui," aya azua maredrava.
S.PHON: "ui," aja azua maRəɖava.
S.TRANSL: “All right,” said the girls.

S.FORM: qau masik azua mareḍava.
S.PHON: qau masik azua marəɖava.
S.FORM: qau masik azua maredrava.
S.PHON: qau masik azua maRəɖava.
S.TRANSL: The girls weeded,

S.FORM: qau azua mareqali qemiladj itjua qapaz nua kavuavuan.
S.PHON: qau azua marəqaɭi qəmiɭaɉ icua qapaz nua kavuavuan.
S.FORM: qau azua mareqali qemiladj itjua qapaz nua kavuavuan.
S.PHON: qau azua maRəqaɣi qəmiɣaɉ iʦua qapaz nua kavuavuan.
S.TRANSL: and the men sat at the edge of the field

S.FORM: qau sa san paḍangani a mareḍava.
S.PHON: qau sa san paɖaŋani a marəɖava.
S.FORM: qau sa san padrangani a maredrava.
S.PHON: qau sa san paɖaŋani a maRəɖava.
S.TRANSL: and teased the girls.

S.FORM: nu masik azua mareḍava, kidjeketsan a tsengal nua qalitsi.
S.PHON: nu masik azua marəɖava, kiɉəkəʦan a ʦəŋaɭ nua qaɭiʦi.
S.FORM: nu masik azua maredrava, kidjekecan a cengal nua qalici.
S.PHON: nu masik azua maRəɖava, kiɉəkəʦan a ʦəŋaɣ nua qaɣiʦi.
S.TRANSL: While the girls weeded, the men touched their (the women’s) knees with their private parts.

S.FORM: qau "ii ii," aya a mareḍava, sa sapsapi azua qalitsi.
S.PHON: qau "ii ii," aja a marəɖava, sa sapsapi azua qaɭiʦi.
S.FORM: qau "ii ii," aya a maredrava, sa sapsapi azua qalici.
S.PHON: qau "ii ii," aja a maRəɖava, sa sapsapi azua qaɣiʦi.
S.TRANSL: “Oo oo,” said the girls, and scratched at the men’s private parts.

S.FORM: ɫakua inika masapsap; tsemiketsikel azua qalitsi a sema tjua tsengal.
S.PHON: ʎakua inika masapsap; ʦəmikəʦikəɭ azua qaɭiʦi a səma cua ʦəŋaɭ.
S.FORM: ljakua inika masapsap; cemikecikel azua qalici a sema tjua cengal.
S.PHON: ʎakua inika masapsap; ʦəmikəʦikəɣ azua qaɣiʦi a səma ʦua ʦəŋaɣ.
S.TRANSL: But they didn’t get rid of them; they kept coming back to their knees.

S.FORM: qau temarev anga aza mareḍava.
S.PHON: qau təmarəv aŋa aza marəɖava.
S.FORM: qau temarev anga aza maredrava.
S.PHON: qau təmaRəv aŋa aza maRəɖava.
S.TRANSL: And so the girls finished their turn of weeding.

S.FORM: qau "timunay anga a masik," ayain azua mareqali.
S.PHON: qau "timunaj aŋa a masik," ajain azua marəqaɭi.
S.FORM: qau "timunay anga a masik," ayain azua mareqali.
S.PHON: qau "timunaj aŋa a masik," ajain azua maRəqaɣi.
S.TRANSL: “Now it’s you to weed,” the men were told.

S.FORM: qau vaik azua mareqali a masik.
S.PHON: qau vaik azua marəqaɭi a masik.
S.FORM: qau vaik azua mareqali a masik.
S.PHON: qau vaik azua maRəqaɣi a masik.
S.TRANSL: So the men went to weed.

S.FORM: nu masik azua mareqali, kidjeketsan nua kutji a tsengal.
S.PHON: nu masik azua marəqaɭi, kiɉəkəʦan nua kuci a ʦəŋaɭ.
S.FORM: nu masik azua mareqali, kidjekecan nua kutji a cengal.
S.PHON: nu masik azua maRəqaɣi, kiɉəkəʦan nua kuʦi a ʦəŋaɣ.
S.TRANSL: While the men were weeding, their knees were touched by the girls’ private parts.

S.FORM: "ii, a kutji," aya mareqali, sa sapsapi.
S.PHON: "ii, a kuci," aja marəqaɭi, sa sapsapi.
S.FORM: "ii, a kutji," aya mareqali, sa sapsapi.
S.PHON: "ii, a kuʦi," aja maRəqaɣi, sa sapsapi.
S.TRANSL: “Ugh, private parts,” said the men, and brushed them away;

S.FORM: ɫakua inika sualap.
S.PHON: ʎakua inika suaɭap.
S.FORM: ljakua inika sualap.
S.PHON: ʎakua inika suaɣap.
S.TRANSL: but they didn’t go away.

S.FORM: qau luslusen tua vuka.
S.PHON: qau ɭusɭusən tua vuka.
S.FORM: qau luslusen tua vuka.
S.PHON: qau ɣusɣusən tua vuka.
S.TRANSL: They prodded them with digging-sticks,

S.FORM: ɫakua inika sualap angata.
S.PHON: ʎakua inika suaɭap aŋata.
S.FORM: ljakua inika sualap angata.
S.PHON: ʎakua inika suaɣap aŋata.
S.TRANSL: but they just wouldn’t go away.

S.FORM: qau marekutj azua mareqali tua kutji.
S.PHON: qau marəkuc azua marəqaɭi tua kuci.
S.FORM: qau marekutj azua mareqali tua kutji.
S.PHON: qau maRəkuʦ azua maRəqaɣi tua kuʦi.
S.TRANSL: The men were afraid of these private parts.

S.FORM: qau pagerits azua mareqali, sa kavilad anga.
S.PHON: qau pagəriʦ azua marəqaɭi, sa kaviɭad aŋa.
S.FORM: qau pageric azua mareqali, sa kavilad anga.
S.PHON: qau pagəRiʦ azua maRəqaɣi, sa kaviɣad aŋa.
S.TRANSL: And the men screamed and ran away.
